creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 172131
multimedia/qmmp-qt5: Switch version from 1.1.0 to 1.1.0

qmmp version 1.1.1 has been released with updated/revised
traslation of Russian, Ukrainian, and Portuguese.

The latest options helper for CMake boolean flags is used.
Temporary bugfix patch is also added.
